name: collect-submission-docs
title: Collect Submission Docs
description: Multi-stakeholder document collection workflow. Sends coordinated outreach emails, tracks submissions via SFTP, and iterates with reminders or fix requests until all required documents are received or the campaign is closed.

steps.name: Provide deadlines, owners and other values
steps.description: Provide a JSON object with all information needed for the document collection campaign. Required keys: stakeholders (array of objects with name, email, documents, deadline, requirements), sftp_address, and campaign_context. Additional keys are passed through to the email drafter.

params.name: mapping

steps.name: Fill email template
steps.description: Fills email template based on the user provided values.

steps.name: Check email
steps.description: Human verifies if email is rendered correctly, otherwise return to step 1 to provide correct values.

steps.name: Send Preview to Workflow Owner
steps.description: Send the approved email draft to the person who triggered the workflow (WORKFLOW_OWNER_EMAIL env var) so they can review it in their inbox before it reaches all stakeholders.

steps.name: Show Approval Summary
steps.description: Prepares recipient list and subject for the approval step view.

steps.name: Approve Sending to Stakeholders
steps.description: Check your inbox for the preview email. Decide whether to send it to all stakeholders as-is, or abort the campaign.

steps.name: Send Email to All Stakeholders
steps.description: Send the approved email to all stakeholder addresses from the mapping. The Workflow Owner is added in CC.

steps.name: Verify SFTP Submissions
steps.description: Connect to the SFTP shared drive and summarize the files found.

agent.prompt:
Connect to the SFTP shared drive and summarize its contents.

Credentials are available as environment variables:
- SFTP_IP — server IP address
- SFTP_USER — username
- SFTP_PASSWORD — password
- SFTP_PATH — folder path to inspect

Steps:
1. Install paramiko if not already available:
   pip3 install paramiko --break-system-packages --quiet
2. Use a Python script (via Bash) to connect to the SFTP server on port 22
   using the credentials above. Disable host-key checking for
   non-interactive use. List all files in SFTP_PATH (no recursion).
3. Download each file to /tmp/sftp_files/ and read its content.
   Write a 1-2 sentence summary of what the file contains.
4. Produce the final output JSON at /output/result.json:
   {
     "verificationReport": "<summary>",
     "pendingStakeholders": []
   }
   Where verificationReport is:
   - "The folder is empty — no files have been uploaded yet." if no files found.
   - Otherwise: one entry per file with its filename and a 1-2 sentence
     content summary.

steps.name: Check Files Report - Decide Next Action
steps.description: Review the SFTP report above, pick the date/time for the next scheduled action, then choose what to do next.

params.name: scheduled_action_date
params.description: Date and time for the next scheduled action. The action triggers at the first heartbeat tick after this time (within 15 minutes on staging/prod; call /api/cron/heartbeat manually in local dev). Time is interpreted in your local browser timezone.

steps.name: Draft Reminder Email
steps.description: Draft a polite reminder email to stakeholders.

agent.prompt:
Draft a polite reminder email to stakeholders who have not yet submitted
their required documents.

Context available in /output/input.json:
- steps.verify-sftp.verificationReport — summary of what has and hasn't been submitted
- steps.provide-mapping.mapping — original stakeholder mapping with deadlines

Parse /output/input.json, read the verification report and mapping, then
compose a professional reminder email referencing the specific missing
documents and original deadlines.

Write the result to /output/result.json:
{
  "reminderSubject": "<email subject>",
  "reminderBody": "<plain text email body>",
  "reminderRecipients": ["<email addresses of stakeholders with missing docs>"]
}

steps.name: Send Reminder Email
steps.description: Send the reminder email to pending stakeholders. Workflow Owner is CC'd.

steps.name: Draft Fix / Clarification Request
steps.description: Draft an email asking stakeholders to correct or clarify their submissions.

agent.prompt:
Draft a professional email asking specific stakeholders to correct errors
or provide clarifications about their submitted documents.

Context available in /output/input.json:
- steps.verify-sftp.verificationReport — details of what was wrong or missing
- steps.check-decision.comment — the reviewer's note on what needs fixing
- steps.provide-mapping.mapping — original stakeholder mapping

Parse /output/input.json, read the verification report, the reviewer's
comment, and the mapping, then compose a targeted email explaining clearly
what needs to be corrected and how.

Write the result to /output/result.json:
{
  "fixEmailSubject": "<email subject>",
  "fixEmailBody": "<plain text email body>",
  "fixEmailRecipients": ["<email addresses of affected stakeholders>"]
}

steps.name: Send Fix / Clarification Request
steps.description: Send the fix or clarification request to relevant stakeholders. Workflow Owner is CC'd.

steps.name: Wait Until Scheduled Time
steps.description: Pause until the scheduled date, then re-check SFTP submissions.

steps.name: Wait Until Scheduled Time
steps.description: Pause until the scheduled date, then send the reminder email.

steps.name: Wait Until Scheduled Time
steps.description: Pause until the scheduled date, then send the fix request email.
